sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31367" key="ei)shlusi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εἰσηλ-ῠσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n31367.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">coming in, entrance,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.625</biblScope> </bibl>(<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Maced.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
